SOFTWARE DEVELOPER
Leeds, UK

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Software Developer with experience building browser-based applications using JavaScript and TypeScript. Skilled in developing interactive React interfaces and supporting Node.js services for data-driven web applications. Familiar with HTML5 capabilities including Canvas for browser rendering and visualisation. Experience working in Agile teams contributing to design, development and maintenance of production systems.

TECHNICAL SKILLS
- Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript
- Frontend: ReactJS, HTML5, Canvas API, responsive UI development, component-based architecture
- Backend: NodeJS, REST APIs, asynchronous data handling
- Styling & Tooling: Less, Webpack, NPM, ESLint
- Testing: Unit testing, automated testing
- Practices: Object-oriented programming, modular JavaScript architecture, software design patterns
- Tools & Environment: Git, Docker, CI pipelines, Linux/macOS, Agile development

WORK EXPERIENCE
Software Developer | Product Company
Jul 2025 - Present
- Developed React and TypeScript interfaces displaying operational metrics and activity through browser dashboards.
- Implemented interactive UI components using HTML5 features including Canvas to visualise operational datasets.
- Built NodeJS services collecting and structuring operational data, exposing REST endpoints consumed by applications.
- Refactored legacy JavaScript modules into TypeScript components, improving maintainability and reducing errors.
- Contributed to Webpack build configuration, automated testing workflows and CI pipelines while working within Agile sprint cycles and Git-based code review processes.

Software Developer | Contract Role
Mar 2025 - Jun 2025
- Built ReactJS applications enabling users to explore complex operational datasets retrieved from backend APIs.
- Developed TypeScript components transforming and rendering large data responses within browser interfaces.
- Implemented NodeJS endpoints exposing structured REST APIs consumed by frontend reporting applications.
- Created HTML5 Canvas UI components visualising trends and activity patterns within operational data dashboards.

PROJECTS
Interactive Operational Planning Interface
- Developed ReactJS and TypeScript interface for interacting with structured datasets through dynamic UI components.
- Implemented HTML5 Canvas rendering to visualise layout structures and spatial relationships within browser interfaces.
- Built NodeJS services responsible for retrieving and preparing datasets consumed by frontend components.

EDUCATION
MSc in Advanced Computer Science
BTech Computer Science and Engineering
